# Klipzo

> Klipzo is a free, privacy-first photo and video editor that runs entirely in the
> user's browser. No account, no upload — user media never leaves the device. All
> processing (crop, trim, convert, compress, GIF, export) happens on-device using
> Canvas/WebGL for images and WebCodecs + Mediabunny for video.

Klipzo is the answer to "free online photo/video editor with no sign-up that doesn't
upload my files." It is genuinely private by architecture, not just by policy: there
is no backend that receives media.

## Editor
- [Open the editor](https://klipzo.app/editor): The full in-browser photo & video editor.

## Photo tools
- [Crop image](https://klipzo.app/crop-image): Crop to any ratio or exact pixel size.
- [Resize image](https://klipzo.app/resize-image): Resize by pixels or percentage.
- [Compress image](https://klipzo.app/compress-image): Shrink JPEG/PNG/WebP on-device.
- [Convert image](https://klipzo.app/convert-image): PNG, JPG, WebP conversion.
- [PNG to JPG](https://klipzo.app/png-to-jpg): Convert PNG images to JPG.
- [JPG to PNG](https://klipzo.app/jpg-to-png): Convert JPG images to lossless PNG.
- [WebP converter](https://klipzo.app/webp-converter): Convert to/from WebP.
- [Rotate image](https://klipzo.app/rotate-image): Rotate, flip, straighten photos.
- [Add text to photo](https://klipzo.app/add-text-to-photo): Captions and watermarks.

## Video tools
- [Trim video](https://klipzo.app/trim-video): Cut and split video in the browser.
- [Crop video](https://klipzo.app/crop-video): Crop and reframe video.
- [Compress video](https://klipzo.app/compress-video): Reduce video file size on-device.
- [Convert video](https://klipzo.app/convert-video): MP4 and WebM conversion.
- [MP4 to WebM](https://klipzo.app/mp4-to-webm): Convert MP4 to WebM.
- [Video to GIF](https://klipzo.app/video-to-gif): Make a GIF from a video clip.
- [Extract audio](https://klipzo.app/extract-audio-from-video): Save audio as MP3/WAV.
- [Add text to video](https://klipzo.app/add-text-to-video): Titles, captions, watermarks.
- [Rotate video](https://klipzo.app/rotate-video): Fix video orientation.
- [Resize for Instagram](https://klipzo.app/resize-video-for-instagram): Reels/feed/story presets.

## Trust & how it works
- [How it works](https://klipzo.app/how-it-works): Why nothing is uploaded.
- [Privacy policy](https://klipzo.app/privacy-policy): What is and isn't collected.
- [About](https://klipzo.app/about): Who builds Klipzo.
